# DropConnect Full Documentation

> Complete developer, user, and agent documentation for DropConnect cross-device clipboard sync.

## Overview
DropConnect is a web-based universal clipboard tool that enables real-time clipboard synchronization and file transfer between mobile and desktop devices without installing native mobile applications.

## Technical Architecture
- **WebSockets / Supabase Realtime**: Broadcasts encrypted clipboard channels.
- **Client-Side AES Encryption**: All clipboard contents are encrypted with secret key stored only in URL query parameter (`key=...`) or local storage.
- **Service Worker**: PWA offline support with network-first navigation routing.

## Page Index
- [Home Page](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/): Main landing page.
- [Desk Display Receiver](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/receiver): Displays room QR code.
- [Mobile Sender](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/sender): Camera scanner and text sender.
- [Login Page](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/login): User authentication.
- [Premium Dashboard](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/premium): Space management.
- [Account Settings](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/settings): Profile settings.
- [Feedback](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/feedback): Anonymous feedback.
- [Privacy Policy](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/terms): Terms of service.
- [Refund Policy](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/refund): Cancellation and refund policy.
